title: Bladhia morrisonensis
taxonomy: Bladhia morrisonensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Loranthaceae. It is a type of mistletoe native to Taiwan. The classification of Bladhia morrisonensis is as follows: Kingdom - Plantae, Clade - Angiosperms, Clade - Eudicots, Clade - Asterids, Order - Santalales, Family - Loranthaceae, Genus - Bladhia, Species - B. morrisonensis.
